prompt: Accomplish App Dashboard - Obsidian Emerald Dark Theme. Premium deep charcoal/blue-slate background (#0c1324) with glowing emerald highlights. Features a top navigation header with tab switcher: 'Regular Payroll' and 'WFH Daily Log'. Includes a 'Task T(h)inker' widget in a right-hand sidebar showing IPCR Target commitments (progress bars) and a list of 'AI Suggested Tasks' (e.g., 'Run R scripting checks on WGP dataset', 'Standardize CBMS Portal component tokens') with quick '+' buttons to add them to the log. Main area shows either the period entries table (Regular Payroll) or a daily WFH activity log table (Date, Output, Hours, Target Code). High-end typography (Geist and Inter) and glassmorphic card layouts.
